etymology.description: 人(人) (rén, "person") + 又(又) (yòu, "hand") = a hand grabbing a person -> to reach
etymology.interpretation: The character 及(jí, "and; to reach") combines 人(人) (rén, "person") with 又(又) (yòu, "hand") to depict the idea of a hand catching up to or reaching for a person. This visual metaphor effectively communicates the concept of reaching or arriving at something.

examples.chinese: 他的表现及格了(他的表現及格了)。
examples.english: His performance reached the passing mark.

examples.chinese: 会议时间及地点会提前通知(會議時間及地點會提前通知)。
examples.pinyin: Huìyì shíjiān jí dìdiǎn huì tíqián tōngzhī.
examples.english: The meeting time and location will be notified in advance.

examples.chinese: 我们可以提供餐饮及住宿服务(我們可以提供餐飲及住宿服務)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen kěyǐ tígōng cānyǐn jí zhùsù fúwù.
examples.english: We can provide catering and accommodation services.
